comments: "Lots of long tracks tonight so settle back and enjoy"
The winner of the FNC didn't supply his full address so Tommy implores that he sends it in otherwise he'll spend the £12 record token!

sessions.details: Available here. Lee Payne (bass), Steve Rounds (guitar), Kevin Putney (drums), Dave Potter (vocals).
